profile_basis.source: frankenjax-vgd3x after pass139 NR8 rejection and pass140 broad SIMD rejection
profile_basis.diagnosis: The live flat packed GEMM MRxNR kernel was still arithmetic-throughput bound after scalar tile widening failed. This pass applies only safe portable SIMD lanes to the full flat panel, leaving the KC-blocked 2048 path scalar until it has a separate baseline and proof.

change.lever: Replace the flat full MRxNR tile's four scalar [f64; 4] column accumulators with std::simd::Simd<f64, 4> lanes.
unchanged: row and column remainder paths remain scalar

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
baseline.note: Same-worker scalar control captured with an empty source diff immediately before the narrowed flat-SIMD candidate.

candidate.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64 --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
candidate.note: Final narrowed candidate: flat full-panel SIMD lanes only.

isomorphism.ordering: The row-block, panel, row-tile, and k-loop order are unchanged. Each output cell still receives products in ascending k order.
isomorphism.floating_point: No horizontal reductions, reassociation, mul_add calls, FMA forcing, mixed precision, BLAS, LAPACK, MKL, XLA, or unsafe code are introduced. SIMD lanes are independent output columns.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: GEMM has no ordering ties or comparator behavior.

proof_tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-flat-simd-test-20260606b cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture

check.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-flat-simd-check-20260606b cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

clippy.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-vgd3x-flat-simd-clippy-20260606b cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

format.package_fmt_note: cargo fmt --check --package fj-lax currently reports pre-existing formatting drift in crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs from the prior eig lane; tensor_contraction.rs is clean and this pass leaves linalg.rs untouched.

next_target: Reprofile after landing. If GEMM remains hot, attack a separate KC-blocked/2048 SIMD proof or a Dot-only recursive/Strassen path behind an explicit tolerance contract.
